feed.title: Loopback Social — Community News
feed.subtitle: Events and announcements shared across the Loopback Social community network.

entry.title: 오는 8월 29일, UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026이 한국마이크로소프트에서 개최됩니다! / UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 will be held at Microsoft Korea on August 29!
entry.summary: [KO] 오는 8월 29일, UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026이 한국마이크로소프트에서 개최됩니다! [EN] UbuCon Korea X MiniDebConf Korea 2026 will be held at Microsoft Korea on August 29! Event: 2026-08-29T00:00:00.000Z — 2026-08-29T08:00:00.000Z Category: announcement

entry.title: Dot4 7월 meetup
entry.summary: [KO] Dot4 7월 meetup Event: 2026-07-23T04:30:00.000Z — 2026-07-23T08:00:00.000Z Category: event Location: 서울 종로구 종로1길 50 13층

entry.title: Build //localhost:Seoul
entry.summary: [KO] Build //localhost:Seoul Event: 2026-06-25T04:30:00.000Z — 2026-06-25T09:00:00.000Z Category: event Location: 서울특별시 종로구 중학동 종로1길 50

entry.title: 🚀 Ship to Production: 오픈 프로젝트 시즌 III 모집🔥 (~6/26 마감) / 🚀 Ship to Production: Open Project Season III Recruitment🔥 (Deadline: 6/26)
entry.summary: [KO] 🚀 Ship to Production: 오픈 프로젝트 시즌 III 모집🔥 (~6/26 마감) [EN] 🚀 Ship to Production: Open Project Season III Recruitment🔥 (Deadline: 6/26) Event: 2026-05-02T15:00:00.000Z — 2026-06-26T14:59:59.000Z Category: announcement

entry.title: .NET Universe 2026 다시 보기 영상이 순차 공개됩니다. 페이지에서 확인해 보세요. / Replay videos for .NET Universe 2026 are being released in sequence. Check the event page for updates.
entry.summary: [KO] .NET Universe 2026 다시 보기 영상이 순차 공개됩니다. 페이지에서 확인해 보세요. [EN] Replay videos for .NET Universe 2026 are being released in sequence. Check the event page for updates. Event: 2026-03-29T15:00:00.000Z — 2026-12-31T15:00:00.000Z Category: announcement

entry.title: 뉴스나 커뮤니티 링크를 제보하세요! 여기를 클릭해서 알려주세요. / Submit news or community links! Click here to let us know.
entry.summary: [KO] 뉴스나 커뮤니티 링크를 제보하세요! 여기를 클릭해서 알려주세요. [EN] Submit news or community links! Click here to let us know. Event: 2019-12-31T15:00:00.000Z — 2099-12-31T14:59:59.000Z Category: announcement
